subtitle: A 1.5-kilometre west-facing crescent on Phuket's Andaman coast where the southwest monsoon that ruins the swimming makes the surf — the same swell that has drowned tourists who ignored the red flags and the swell that fills the Kata surf contest every September.
spike_statement: The southwest monsoon that builds Kata's September surf is the same rip-current season that drowns swimmers who ignore the red flags.
